title: India: Kandla Port Partners with Green-Kutch NextGen for Green Hydrogen Ecosystem
content: During the Vibrant Gujarat Regional Conference at Rajkot, Shri Sushil Kumar Singh, IRSME, Chairman DPA Kandla, signed an MoU with Green-Kutch NextGen Pvt. Ltd. to promote community participation in the Green Hydrogen ecosystem at Kandla under the National Green Hydrogen Mission. The partnership aims to empower MSMEs, generate youth employment and accelerate decarbonisation. DPA will develop â€œKutch Green Hydrogen Parkâ€ with plug-and-play infrastructure, enabling industry partners to set up modular green hydrogen production & storage facilities, advancing Indiaâ€™s Net Zero Vision.
author: Analysts Account
